notes: Free admission to most walking tours; excludes Architecture tours, private tours, 'Boston with a BOO!' and 'Footloose on the Freedom Trail'.
raw: Free admission to most of Boston By Foot’s Walking Tours (with the exception of Architecture tours, private tours, "Boston with a BOO!" and "Footloose on the Freedom Trail"). Available seasonally from April- October.

source_phrases.notes: Free admission to most of Boston By Foot's Walking Tours (with the exception of Architecture tours
